title: v0.3.1 smoke pass — static-site happy path on Rocky 9.4 + release pipeline fix
host: 192.168.199.234 — Rocky Linux 9.4, Intel Xeon Gold 5218 (64c), kernel 5.14

scope.deploy: First v0.3 deploy onto the Rocky box (uptime 600d). Surfaced two install.sh bugs that are now fixed in 70a8d48.
scope.smokePass: Static site happy path (S1) validated end-to-end. Reverse proxy / reconcile / PHP / SSL deferred to a follow-up smoke when the box has a real public domain.

validatedChecklist: S1 static site create — UI → conf write → nginx -t → reload → curl Host: header returns served file
deferredChecklist: S2 reverse proxy with real upstream
S4 ACME HTTP-01 against LE staging (needs public domain)
S5 ACME DNS-01 against Cloudflare (needs real domain + CF token)
S6 PHP-FPM site (needs operator-provisioned FPM container)
